first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (4/10) for the same core reason: the candidate is a strong individual contributor but has no formal people management experience, which is a hard requirement for the role. Minor differences in wording and the calculation of total years of experience ('18+' vs '15+') are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not alter the final assessment or its justification.
